specs.key_requirements: SpecIRGenerator trait definition and routing, Pluggable generators for multiple frameworks, Code generation system architecture, Support for wireframe/component/design-token section types

WireframeSpec input schema (name, component_type, props, layout), JSX rendering for node kinds (text, button, input, list, semantic HTML), TypeScript props interface generation, Barrel export file generation, Template fallback mechanism

SpecIR YAML manifest schema with Kubernetes-style envelope (apiVersion, kind, metadata, spec), Kind enum definition (Api, FlowchartPlus, SequencePlus, ClassPlus, ErdPlus, RequirementPlus), SpecMetadata contract, Strict serialization validation
SpecIR enum type definition (Api, Wireframe, Component, DesignToken, Deploy variants), SpecMetadata structure for routing, From trait implementations for type conversion
Code generator contract and responsibilities, Spec input to framework-specific output mapping, Inference rules for semantic interpretation, Generator composition patterns
Tera template engine integration, Template directory structure (react/, component/, design-token/), Fallback to inline string generation, Template discovery and routing
Spec validation framework for all section types, Validator logic and error reporting, Completeness checks for wireframe/component/design-token inputs
Generate subsystem architecture, Generation pipeline and data flow, Code generation framework overview, Section type routing
SDD phase flow context, Reference context phase placement in workflow

revisions_applied.title: Add spec-validator.md to reference context
revisions_applied.description: spec-validator.md is required for validation of all three frontend section types (wireframe, component, design-token)

revisions_applied.title: Fix spec-ir-schema.md entry accuracy
revisions_applied.description: Original entry claimed 'Wireframe kind definition' but actual spec's kind enum does not include Wireframe (only Api, FlowchartPlus, SequencePlus, ClassPlus, ErdPlus, RequirementPlus)

spec_fixes.old_key_requirements: SpecIR YAML manifest schema, Wireframe kind definition, WireframeSpec structure for component layout
spec_fixes.new_key_requirements: SpecIR YAML manifest schema with Kubernetes-style envelope (apiVersion, kind, metadata, spec), Kind enum definition (Api, FlowchartPlus, SequencePlus, ClassPlus, ErdPlus, RequirementPlus), SpecMetadata contract, Strict serialization validation

revisions_applied.title: Add component generator reference coverage
revisions_applied.description: Component (CEM → TypeScript) had zero spec references. Added spec-ir-contract.md which covers Component variant in SpecIR enum, and codegen-system.md which covers component generation routing
revisions_applied.coverage_notes: spec-ir-contract.md defines Component as a SpecIR variant, codegen-system.md describes the routing and architecture for component generators

revisions_applied.title: Add design-token generator reference coverage
revisions_applied.description: Design-token (DTCG → CSS + Tailwind) had zero spec references. Added spec-ir-contract.md which covers DesignToken variant, and codegen-system.md which describes design-token generation routing
revisions_applied.coverage_notes: spec-ir-contract.md defines DesignToken as a SpecIR variant, codegen-system.md describes the routing and architecture for design-token generators, template-engine.md describes the template directory structure for design-token/
